generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a woman who values security, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have made our communities safer. Critics claim these measures infringe on liberties, but in reality, they've prevented countless threats. We can't afford to be naive about the dangers we face. Strong security isn't about control—it's about protection. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFamilies
